description: CompositionBeige coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Are you feeling disturbed by the craziness around you? Well then, stay quite and let this tantra t-shirt speak for you. Pair it with cargo shorts and flip flops for a relaxed look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6'; Shoulders: 18"
